title: Castlevania: Belmont's Curse Sweeps International Critics' First Impressions
summary: Specialized press praises the return of the saga with frantic gameplay and cinematography inspired by the Netflix anime.

title: God of War Series Forced to Change Kratos Actor After Ryan Hurst's Serious Injury
summary: Prime Video is looking for a new protagonist for the video game adaptation after the actor suffered an accident during stunts on set.

title: Marvel's Wolverine Trailer Sparks Euphoria but Reignites Fan Anger Over the End of Physical Format on PlayStation
summary: Sony releases a new trailer for the Wolverine game while the community remains outraged by the lack of physical units and the commitment to digital format.

title: Bungie Announces Experimental Roguelike PvE Mode for Marathon That Will Only Be Available for Two Weeks
summary: The anticipated shooter will have a limited trial of its cooperative mode in July, with a full launch planned for season 3.

title: Mortal Shell 2 PS5 Physical Edition Sells Out, Reigniting Debate on Physical Format Demand
summary: The 'Revered Edition' of the acclaimed soulslike sells out all its pre-order stock, while players point to Sony for its commitment to the digital format.

title: EA Sees 'Enormous Potential' in Integrating Advertising in Its Video Games
summary: Company executives ask developers to plan the insertion of ads in games, although they assure it must be done in a way consistent with the experience.

title: Doom Director Denies That id Software Has Been 'Neutralized' by Xbox Cuts
summary: Hugo Martin assures that the development team is intact and denies rumors of a 'bloodbath' at the studio following Microsoft's mass layoffs.

title: Microsoft Faces Union Complaints Over 'Illegal' Layoffs in Xbox Division
summary: Workers file complaints over unfair labor practices while a report reveals confusion and lack of communication during the staff cuts at Microsoft Gaming.

title: GTA 6 Pre-Orders Generate $260 Million in First Week with Record Sales Forecasts
summary: Newzoo confirms that the Grand Theft Auto VI pre-order campaign is the strongest ever recorded, while other firms anticipate a historic launch.

title: GameStop CEO Declares That Physical Games Are 'Totally Irrelevant'
summary: The chain's top executive reveals that physical software represents less than 12% of its business, fueling the debate on the future of the video game market.

title: Hasbro and Nintendo Partner to Create a New Line of The Legend of Zelda Toys
summary: The alliance between the toy company and Nintendo will result in figures and play sets based on the iconic adventure saga, with the first product to be announced soon.

title: Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic Remake Could Launch in 2028
summary: Saber Interactive's new business head states that, 'hopefully', the anticipated remake could see the light that year after being originally announced in 2021.

title: God of War's Laufey Actress Remains Unfazed by Online Hate
summary: The protagonist of Santa Monica Studio's new title says she is not worried about the insults and assures that the game is 'great', defending her work.

title: Capcom Launches Air Fresheners with Characteristic Scents of Street Fighter 6 Characters
summary: The new line of official fragrances allows fans to smell like their favorite fighters, including Juri's controversial foot odor scent.

title: Hot Wheels Infinite Rush Advances Its Release to September 10 on Nintendo Switch 2
summary: The open-world racing game from the toy car franchise will arrive on Nintendo's console ahead of schedule, with a new release date in September.

title: Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4 Sparks Controversy Over Bugs, Vehicles, and Control Changes
summary: Infinity Ward shows new features that divide the community, from a bug in the weapon flash to a vehicle reminiscent of the Warthog and the removal of mouse and keyboard support.

title: Matt Damon: From Rejecting a Bourne Game to Becoming a Fortnite Character
summary: The actor reveals that he turned down a large sum of money for a Bourne game due to lack of creative control, while his character is now available in the battle royale.

title: A24 Sparks Community Wrath by Claiming Copyright on 'Backrooms' Content It Does Not Own
summary: The film studio takes down indie videos and games of the saga online, although the film's director has intervened to try to stop these actions.

title: Google and Meta Workers Protest Mass Layoffs and Use of Artificial Intelligence to Decide Them
summary: Thousands of Google employees sign a protection petition against the cuts, while Meta is sued for allegedly using an AI algorithm to select those laid off.

title: Sony Announces Open Beta for Marvel Tōkon, Its Fighting Game, for Late July
summary: The anticipated superhero fighting game will have a free trial from July 24 to 26 where players can try the initial 15 fighters of the roster.
